channel.title: Mac-Studio on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mac-Studio on jamesm.blog

item.title: How to Phone Your Home AI Agent Running on a Mac Studio
item.description: A practical walkthrough of the stack I use to literally phone my Mac Studio, speak to a local AI agent, and get it to run or check work while I'm away from the desk.

item.title: Which Mac Studio Should You Buy for Running LLMs Locally?
item.description: A practical guide to Mac Studio configs for running popular free models locally (Qwen, LLaMA, Mixtral), realistic performance expectations, and which hardware actually makes sense.
